About

Sanjita Maharjan

AI Marketing Expert & Consultant. Where creativity meets Artificial Intelligence.

My story

Marketing strategy shaped for the AI era

Sanjita helps brands move from curiosity about AI to confident implementation, combining creative marketing judgment with practical automation and digital growth systems.

Consulting philosophy

The best AI systems are clear, human-centered, and useful. Every recommendation is designed around real workflows, business goals, and the audience a brand wants to serve.

  • Adopt AI with clarity
  • Improve productivity
  • Increase revenue
  • Modernize operations
Core expertise

A strategic blend of AI, marketing, and business growth

Timeline

Professional journey

Education

Built a foundation in business, marketing, research, and digital communication.
